sColDescription: Time of transaction.
The transaction type (or ID). See table decription for possible transaction ID's.
The rebate (or validation) index in the transaction (if available). Appears in transaction 30, 31, 40 and 41.
Used by the old XML export interface (XMLExport.exe) to mark if a transaction was already exported or not. Not used for new installations anymore.
The calculated costs (if available).
The (virtual) ticket number (KP) or card number (DP). Equal to the field TicketNumber.
The ID of the equipment (use OPMS..Equipment to get equipment details).
The ID of the location (use OPMS..Location to get location details).
The ID of the car park (use OPMS..ParkingAdmin to get car park details).

The cashier ID for transactions with credit card details. Relevant only for manual cashier terminals.
Not used for reporting as the cashier ID is missing for other transactions (e.g. cash payment).

The shift ID for transactions with credit card details. Relevant only for manual cashier terminals.
Not used for reporting as the cashier ID is missing for other transactions (e.g. cash payment).
The PH number reported in the transaction.

The payment method (if a payment took place):
  0: cash
  1: common credit card
  2: check
  3: value card
  4: value card 2 (DL700)
  10..21: credit card, peripheral type 0..11
The previous station address.
The region code.
The sub-number relevant for certain DP card types (e.g. congress and visitor cards). Refer to "Parcotax 900 Ticketspecification" document for more details.
Track 2 data: amount
Track 2 data: amount status
Track 2 data: date
Track 2 data: flag inside / outside car park
Track 2 data: neutral flag for DP cards
Track 2 data: not paid / paid flag
Track 2 data: PH number
Track 2 data: region code
Track 2 data: station address (type and address combined)
Track 2 status in transaction.
Track 2 data: time
Tariff used fo tariff calculation (if tariff calculation took place).
The (virtual) ticket number (KP) or card number (DP). Equal to the field TicketNumber.

The ticket or card type:
  0: KP (also used for CC and tag transactions)
  1: value card
  2: normal DP
  3: congress
  4: visitor
  5: fixed time per day
  7: fixed number of entries
  8: pool card
Date on ticket.
Date of transaction.
Rejection code if available (transaction 63 and 64 don't have a rejection code).
The transaction number (0 - 9999). The field name is a bit misleading; transaction ID is usually used for the transaction identifier (see field TransactionType).
Time on ticket.
